definitions: A suburb of Melbourne, Victoria, Australia, located 2 km east of the central business district.
A railway station in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia, serving the suburb of Jolimont.
A locality in Perth, Western Australia, located within the Town of Cambridge.
examples: She lives in Jolimont, a quiet suburb of Melbourne.
The train stops at Jolimont station.
He grew up in Jolimont, Western Australia.
